data.title: Asiatic Group Clarifies Financial Statement Error and Legal Proceedings
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Asiatic Group (Holdings) Ltd. ( (SG:5CR) ) has provided an announcement.

Asiatic Group (Holdings) Limited has issued a clarification regarding an inadvertent error in its recent financial results announcement. The error pertains to a note on commitments and contingencies involving a legal claim with a joint venture partner, Royal Group Phnom Penh SEZ Plc. The company has stated that confidentiality obligations limit the disclosure of information related to ongoing arbitration, and updates will be provided to shareholders as necessary. Proceedings in the Singapore Court related to this arbitration have been discontinued.

More about Asiatic Group (Holdings) Ltd.

Current Market Cap: S$16.02M

data.title: Feiyang International Announces EGM to Approve Termination Agreement
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Feiyang International Holdings Group Limited ( (HK:1901) ) is now available.

Feiyang International Holdings Group Limited has announced an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled for March 20, 2025, in Ningbo City, China. The meeting will deliberate on the approval of a Termination Agreement and authorize a director to implement necessary actions. This move is significant for stakeholders as it underscores the company’s strategic decision-making and could impact its operational focus and industry positioning.

More about Feiyang International Holdings Group Limited

Feiyang International Holdings Group Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in the travel and tourism industry. Its operations focus on providing travel services and related products, with a strong presence in China.

data.title: dynaCERT Closes $5M Equity Offering to Boost HydraGEN™ Sales
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

dynaCERT ( (TSE:DYA) ) has issued an announcement.

dynaCERT Inc. has successfully closed a $5,000,000 non-brokered equity offering, issuing 33,333,333 units comprising common shares and purchase warrants. The proceeds are intended to finance the global sales of their HydraGEN™ technology to sectors such as mining, oil & gas, and transportation, as well as for working capital and general corporate purposes. This strategic move supports dynaCERT’s positioning within the growing hydrogen economy and bolsters its market presence in carbon emission reduction solutions.

More about dynaCERT

dynaCERT Inc. operates in the carbon emission reduction technology industry, with a focus on manufacturing and distributing technologies such as HydraGEN™ and HydraLytica™ Telematics. These products are designed to enhance fuel efficiency and lower carbon emissions for diesel engines used across various sectors, including transportation, mining, and power generation.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

SolGold ( (GB:SOLG) ) has issued an update.

SolGold plc, a company listed on the London Stock Exchange and the Toronto Stock Exchange, has announced the resolution of legal proceedings with their former CEO, Darryl Cuzzubbo. The settlement, details of which are confidential, concludes the litigation without any admission of serious misconduct by Mr. Cuzzubbo. This resolution may help SolGold refocus on their operations and strategic objectives without the distraction of the legal dispute.

data.title: TSH Resources Berhad Executes Share Buy-Back
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from TSH Resources Bhd. ( (SG:TSH) ) is now available.

TSH Resources Berhad, operating within the palm oil industry, has announced a share buy-back initiative, acquiring 600,000 shares at a price range of 1.190 to 1.200 Malaysian Ringgit per share. The total consideration for this transaction amounted to 722,302.24 MYR, and all purchased shares will be retained in treasury, maintaining a total of 31,580,200 treasury shares, representing approximately 2.28544% of the company’s total issued shares.

data.title: China Agri-Products Exchange Limited Issues HK$50 Million Tranche of Notes
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

China Agri-Products Exchange Limited ( (HK:0149) ) has provided an announcement.

China Agri-Products Exchange Limited has successfully issued a tranche of HK$50 million unsecured fixed interest rate notes under its HK$1 billion medium-term note programme. The notes, maturing in February 2037, have an effective interest rate ranging from approximately 2.8% to 5.4% and are not listed on any stock exchange, reflecting the company’s strategic move to secure long-term financing.

More about China Agri-Products Exchange Limited

China Agri-Products Exchange Limited operates within the agricultural sector, focusing on the exchange of agricultural products. The company is known for its involvement in the distribution and trading of such goods, emphasizing market accessibility and transaction efficiency.

Harmonychain AS ( (DE:7EW) ) has issued an update.

Primary insider Benjamin Miklozek transferred 1,800,000 shares from his personal holdings to his wholly owned holding company, Blipit AS, at a price of NOK 1.80 per share. Despite the transaction, the overall ownership of shares by Benjamin Miklozek and affiliates in Lokotech Group AS remains unchanged, highlighting a strategic internal reallocation of assets.

JAC Recruitment Co., Ltd. ( (JP:2124) ) has issued an update.

JAC Recruitment Co., Ltd. reported record-high revenue and operating profit for FY2024, although net profit decreased due to goodwill impairment. The company plans for a 15% annual growth from 2025-2027, with a significant focus on dividend increases, climate change, DE&I management, and governance to ensure sustainable growth.

More about JAC Recruitment Co., Ltd.

JAC Recruitment Co., Ltd. operates in the recruitment industry, focusing on high-class and professional segments. Its primary services include consulting-based recruitment, and it aims to expand through increasing consultant numbers and enhancing market strategies.

data.title: Hon Hai Acquires Stake in Goertek Electronics Vietnam
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Hon Hai Precision Industry ( (HNHPF) ) has shared an announcement.

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. Ltd., through its subsidiary New Wing Interconnect Technology (Bac Giang) Co., Ltd., has announced the acquisition of a 25% equity stake in Goertek Electronics Vietnam Co. Ltd. for $50 million. This strategic investment aims to enhance Hon Hai’s positioning in the electronics industry, with the transaction subject to regulatory approvals. The decision was made through price negotiation and the acquisition is expected to bolster Hon Hai’s market presence in Vietnam.
